expectations.evidence: Explicit YAML scope-map with code_quality: false, architecture: false, db: false, ux_ui: false. Only security: true and test: true. Sections 3 and 4 cover only these areas. Out-of-scope areas not analyzed.

8 security findings (SEC-001 to SEC-008) with specific file paths and line numbers. Scored by sub-area (6 sub-areas with weights). Critical: SEC-001 (GitHub token in URL). Includes file path, line number, description, severity, and improvement direction for each.

5 test findings (TEST-001 to TEST-005). Identifies zero coverage, no CI/CD, untested core logic. Includes detailed 37-test plan across 3 priority tiers with effort estimates (6 hours total). Covers function-level test cases.
